title: Error linking sub-workflow in Call n8n workflow node
symptom: When attempting to call a sub-workflow from a Call n8n workflow node, the error 'Workflow does not exist' is displayed.
applies_when: Sub-workflow is intended to be called from the same workflow
not_this_if: Sub-workflow is a separate independent workflow
root_cause: The error occurs because the Call n8n workflow node cannot find the specified sub-workflow. This can happen if the sub-workflow is not correctly referenced by name or ID, or if it is not available in the current context.
fix_steps: Ensure the sub-workflow is saved and published.
In the Call n8n workflow node, select the sub-workflow by its name from the dropdown list.
If the name is not available, switch to using the workflow ID and input the ID from the sub-workflow's URL.
agent_instruction: Select the sub-workflow by name or use its ID to reference it correctly.
